**Check the [GitHub page](https://github.com/zezhishao/MTS_Daily_ArXiv) for a better reading experience and more papers.**

## 📋 Today's Overview
*May 01, 2026*

### Superconductivity (16 new today)

1. **Non-local Tunneling Spectroscopy of Inelastic Quasiparticle Relaxation in Superconducting 1-D Wires**  
   The study focuses on superconducting 1-D wires, employing non-local conductance spectroscopy with mesoscopic three-terminal NIS devices to address the spectroscopic investigation of quasiparticle charge and energy imbalance relaxation at mK temperatures.

2. **Engineering superconductivity on the surface of Weyl semimetals**  
   The study focuses on Weyl semimetals, employing theoretical and experimental analysis of surface Fermi arc states to address the realization of high-temperature surface-only superconductivity.

3. **Negative nonlocal and local voltages (resistances) in a quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum structure**  
   The study focuses on a quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum structure, employing measurements of nonlocal and local DC voltages in a magnetic field near the critical temperature to address the observation of negative resistances in normal-superconducting regimes.

4. **Programmable superconducting diode from nematic domain control in FeS**  
   The study focuses on FeS, employing nematic domain control to address the realization of a programmable superconducting diode effect with switchable polarity.

5. **A cm-wave quantum noise limited resonant superconducting parametric amplifier**  
   The study focuses on resonant superconducting parametric amplifiers, employing a quantum-limited design to address ultra low-noise narrow-band amplification for applications like Axion dark matter detection.

6. **Spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance coupled with the superconducting gap in a kagome metal**  
   The study focuses on the kagome metal CsCr3Sb5, employing spectroscopic techniques to address the emergence of a spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance and its coupling to the superconducting gap under high pressure.

7. **From Wavefunction Collapse to Superconductivity: Evolution of the Electronic State in Compressed GaNb4Se8**  
   The study focuses on the lacunar spinel GaNb4Se8, employing pressure-dependent transport measurements to address the evolution from localized (Efros-Shklovskii hopping) to itinerant (superconducting) electronic states.

8. **Thermodynamic Identification of the Internal Superconducting Phase Boundary in UTe$_2$ for $H \parallel b$**  
   The study focuses on UTe2, employing ultrasound measurements in an ultraclean single crystal to address the thermodynamic identification of an internal superconducting phase boundary near 14–15 T for magnetic fields along the b-axis.

9. **Bragg-Williams order competes with superconductivity**  
   The study focuses on the interplay between structural and electronic order, employing a theoretical framework to address the ambiguous role of Bragg-Williams order in competing with emergent superconductivity.

10. **Theoretical study on ambient pressure superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films : structural analysis, model construction, and robustness of $s\pm$-wave pairing**  
    The study focuses on La3Ni

### spin glass (2 new today)

1. **Protein folding on a 64 qubit trapped-ion hardware via counterdiabatic quantum optimization**
   The study focuses on lattice protein-folding optimization, employing bias-field digitized counterdiabatic quantum optimization on a 64-qubit trapped-ion hardware to address the problem of efficiently folding six peptide sequences with 14-16 amino-acid residues.

2. **Griffiths inequalities and Gibbs-Bogoliubov inequality for general gauge glasses with Gaussian disorder on Nishimori line**
   The study focuses on general gauge glass models with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line (including Ising spin glass and XY gauge glass), employing rigorous mathematical proofs to establish that the first and second Griffiths inequalities hold on arbitrary lattice structures, thereby addressing the monotonicity of pressure and correlation functions.

---

## 📄 Paper Details

### Superconductivity

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |

| 1 | **[Non-local Tunneling Spectroscopy of Inelastic Quasiparticle Relaxation in Superconducting 1-D Wires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26862v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Non-local conductance experiments using tunnel junctions can provide valuable spectroscopic information on both the transport and relaxation of quasiparticles in superconductors, as these techniques directly probe the quasiparticle charge and energy imbalance even at mK temperatures. In this work, we employ mesoscopic three terminal Cu and Al NIS devices to study non-local quasiparticle transport over length-scales on the order of the superconducting coherence length in this regime. Via a dual-bias scheme, which utilizes detector biases both above and below the superconducting gap, we are able to extract the effect of quasiparticle energy imbalance via its impact on the self consistent pair potential by symmetry considerations. We observe non-local conductance features due to pair-breaking which are anti-symmetric with respect to the polarity of the voltage bias, with a sharp onset during single electron tunneling at energies around $3Δ$. We compare these findings with quasiclassical simulations including inelastic effects to obtain estimates of the energy dependent inelastic scattering time. In addition, we demonstrate kinetic effects due to a large applied supercurrent which can also be captured in this formalism and decomposed with respect to the particle-hole symmetry and supercurrent direction, and discuss further opportunities for the advancement of this method.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>利用隧道结进行非局域电导实验，可为超导体中准粒子的输运和弛豫提供有价值的光谱信息，因为即使在毫开尔文温度下，这些技术也能直接探测准粒子电荷和能量不平衡。在本工作中，我们采用介观三端铜和铝NIS器件，研究在此条件下超导相干长度尺度上的非局域准粒子输运。通过双偏置方案（利用探测器偏置分别高于和低于超导能隙），我们能够通过对称性考虑，从自洽对势受准粒子能量不平衡的影响中提取其效应。我们观察到由对破缺引起的非局域电导特征，该特征相对于电压偏置极性呈反对称，并在约$3Δ$能量处的单电子隧穿过程中出现尖锐的起始点。我们将这些发现与包含非弹性效应的准经典模拟进行比较，以估算能量依赖的非弹性散射时间。此外，我们展示了由大外加超流引起的动力学效应，该效应也可在此形式体系中捕获，并可根据粒子-空穴对称性和超流方向进行分解，同时讨论了该方法进一步发展的机遇。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Kevin M. Ryan et al. |
| 2 | **[Engineering superconductivity on the surface of Weyl semimetals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26859v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Ten years after the experimental discovery of Weyl semimetals, theoretical and experimental work has pointed to the possibility of realizing surface-only superconductivity at relatively high temperatures in these materials. A consensus is developing that this unusual form of superconductivity is mediated by surface electronic states unique to Weyl semimetals, known as Fermi arcs. In this work, we show that the topological protection of these exotic states can be exploited to engineer high critical temperatures. Motivated by a real-material example (PtBi$_2$), we demonstrate that surface van Hove singularities can be induced by depositing a suitable additional layer on top of the Weyl surface. We also investigate the role of these singularities in raising the critical temperature, showing that it is significantly enhanced when the chemical potential lies in their vicinity. More generally, our results demonstrate how topological protection can be exploited to manipulate surface electronic states, thereby opening experimentally accessible routes toward engineering high-temperature two-dimensional superconductivity and other exotic phases.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在实验发现外尔半金属十年后，理论和实验工作指出，在这些材料中可能实现相对高温下的表面超导电性。一种共识正在形成，即这种不寻常的超导电性是由外尔半金属特有的表面电子态（称为费米弧）所介导。在本工作中，我们展示了可以利用这些奇特态的拓扑保护来设计高临界温度。受真实材料实例（PtBi$_2$）的启发，我们证明可以通过在外尔表面沉积合适的附加层来诱导表面范霍夫奇点。我们还研究了这些奇点在提高临界温度中的作用，表明当化学势位于其附近时，临界温度显著增强。更广泛地说，我们的结果展示了如何利用拓扑保护来操纵表面电子态，从而为设计高温二维超导及其他奇异相开辟了实验上可行的途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Riccardo Vocaturo et al. |
| 3 | **[Negative nonlocal and local voltages (resistances) in a quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26814v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>To study a nonlocal electron transport in an aluminum superconducting quasi-one-dimensional structure, we measured negative nonlocal (local) direct current voltages in the structure in a magnetic field near the critical temperature. The structure is a normal-superconducting at $T_{cn}<T<T_{cw}$ ($T_{cn}$ and $T_{cw}$ are the critical temperatures for narrow and wide wires, respectively, making up this structure). Negative voltage arises due to a quasiparticle current flowing through the N-S interface. We plotted the experimental and theoretical temperature and magnetic-field dependences of current, resistance and voltage corresponding to the peak of negative voltage, taking into account either equilibrium or nonequilibrium superconducting fluctuations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>为了研究铝超导准一维结构中的非局域电子输运，我们在接近临界温度的磁场中测量了该结构中的负非局域（局域）直流电压。该结构在$T_{cn}<T<T_{cw}$（$T_{cn}$和$T_{cw}$分别为构成该结构的窄线和宽线的临界温度）下处于正常-超导状态。负电压的产生源于通过N-S界面的准粒子流。我们绘制了对应于负电压峰值的电流、电阻和电压的实验与理论温度和磁场依赖关系，并考虑了平衡或非平衡超导涨落。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | V. I. Kuznetsov et al. |
| 4 | **[Programmable superconducting diode from nematic domain control in FeS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26631v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE) allows polarity-dependent critical currents when time-reversal and current-inverting spatial symmetries are broken. Superconducting diodes show promise for applications, but inversion asymmetry is usually encoded in sample geometry or non-centrosymmetric crystals, rendering them static circuit elements. Here we demonstrate a programmable superconducting diode whose functionality is encoded in correlated electronic domains. We use the nematic superconductor FeSe as a platform and report a large intrinsic SDE with efficiencies up to $η\sim 75\%$ due to vortices interacting with nematic twin boundaries. The domain wall configuration thus encodes the SDE of the device. Through intense microsecond current pulses to quench the nematic order at rates exceeding $10^7$~K/s, we modify the domain pattern and control the polarity and strength of the SDE. These results establish a new paradigm in which superconducting circuit elements can be programmed through patterns imprinted into correlated electronic states.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应（SDE）允许在时间反演和电流反转空间对称性被破坏时产生依赖于极性的临界电流。超导二极管在应用中展现出前景，但反演不对称性通常编码在样品几何结构或非中心对称晶体中，使其成为静态电路元件。在此，我们展示了一种可编程超导二极管，其功能编码在关联电子畴中。我们使用向列超导体FeSe作为平台，并报告了由于涡旋与向列孪晶界相互作用而产生的大本征SDE，效率高达$η\sim 75\%$。因此，畴壁构型编码了器件的SDE。通过以超过$10^7$ K/s的速率施加强微秒级电流脉冲来猝灭向列序，我们修改了畴图案并控制了SDE的极性和强度。这些结果建立了一种新范式，其中超导电路元件可以通过印刻在关联电子态中的图案进行编程。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | R. D. H. Hinlopen et al. |
| 5 | **[A cm-wave quantum noise limited resonant superconducting parametric amplifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26543v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting Parametric Amplifiers (SPAs) have seen great interest in recent years due to their high gain and quantum limited noise performance. Among these amplifiers, resonant SPAs have been widely developed for experiments where ultra low-noise narrow-band amplification is of interest, such as the search for Axion dark matter in particle physics and the detection of spectroscopic lines in astrophysics, while also finding applications in quantum computing. This work presents an amplifier based on a Complementary Split Ring Resonator (CSRR), patterned on a NbTi coated sapphire substrate embedded within a waveguide, designed to work at a set of four narrow frequency bands throughout K band (18-27 GHz) using the kinetic inductance of the superconducting film. The S-parameters measured at 400 mK, using a sorption cooler, show the four resonances between 23.3 and 26.3 GHz at 1 GHz spacing, with a maximum transmission on resonance of -1 dB. Four-wave mixing has been observed with each resonance, and a maximum signal gain of 30 dB has been measured, corresponding to 29 dB of insertion gain. The noise performance of the amplifier has been measured, showing an added noise of 1.2 half quanta at 400 mK. These results are relevant to high-frequency Axion dark matter experiments and help motivate the exploration of higher frequencies in quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导参量放大器（SPA）近年来因其高增益和量子极限噪声性能而备受关注。在这些放大器中，谐振式SPA已被广泛开发用于需要超低噪声窄带放大的实验，例如粒子物理学中的轴子暗物质搜索和天体物理学中的光谱线探测，同时在量子计算中也有应用。本工作提出了一种基于互补开口环谐振器（CSRR）的放大器，该谐振器制作在嵌入波导的NbTi涂层蓝宝石衬底上，设计利用超导薄膜的动电感在K波段（18-27 GHz）内的四个窄频带工作。使用吸附制冷机在400 mK下测量的S参数显示，在23.3至26.3 GHz之间有四个谐振点，间隔为1 GHz，谐振时的最大传输为-1 dB。每个谐振点均观察到四波混频，测得最大信号增益为30 dB，对应插入增益为29 dB。测量了放大器的噪声性能，显示在400 mK下附加噪声为1.2个半量子。这些结果与高频轴子暗物质实验相关，并有助于推动量子技术中更高频率的探索。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | V. Gilles et al. |
| 6 | **[Spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance coupled with the superconducting gap in a kagome metal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.20735v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The chromium-based kagome metal CsCr3Sb5 has garnered significant interest due to its strong electron correlations, intertwined orders and potential for unconventional superconductivity under high pressure. The evolution of magnetic and superconducting interactions as the more frequently studied CsV3Sb5 is doped to CsCr3Sb5 remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate the emergence of a spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance intertwined with the superconducting gap, enabled by introducing magnetic Cr impurities into the kagome superconductor CsV3Sb5. The addition of dilute Cr impurities not only weakens long range charge density wave order but also produces local magnetic moments that leads to Kondo resonances. We show that the Kondo resonance forms anisotropic, ripple like spatial patterns around individual Cr atoms, breaking all local mirror symmetries. We further reveal that with the emergence of Kondo screening, the coherence peak and depth of superconducting gap with finite zero-energy conductance are enhanced. This suggests that non superconducting carriers at the Fermi surface in the parent compound participate in the Kondo effect, simultaneously screening Cr magnetic moments and increasing the superfluid density. Our findings offer an opportunity to study the interplay between superconductivity and local magnetism in kagome materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基于铬的kagome金属CsCr3Sb5因其强电子关联、相互交织的序以及高压下非常规超导的潜力而备受关注。随着更常研究的CsV3Sb5掺杂至CsCr3Sb5，磁性与超导相互作用的演化仍知之甚少。在此，我们展示了通过向kagome超导体CsV3Sb5中引入磁性Cr杂质，一种空间各向异性的近藤共振态与超导能隙相互交织而出现。添加少量Cr杂质不仅削弱了长程电荷密度波序，还产生了导致近藤共振的局域磁矩。我们发现，近藤共振在单个Cr原子周围形成各向异性的波纹状空间图案，打破了所有局域镜面对称性。我们进一步揭示，随着近藤屏蔽的出现，具有有限零能量电导的超导能隙的相干峰和深度均得到增强。这表明母体化合物费米面上的非超导载流子参与了近藤效应，同时屏蔽了Cr磁矩并增加了超流密度。我们的发现为研究kagome材料中超导与局域磁性之间的相互作用提供了契机。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Zichen Huang et al. |
| 7 | **[From Wavefunction Collapse to Superconductivity: Evolution of the Electronic State in Compressed GaNb4Se8](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26203v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Understanding how electronic transport evolves from localized to itinerant regimes in correlated cluster solids remains an important challenge in condensed-matter physics. Here we investigate the pressure-dependent transport properties of the lacunar spinel GaNb4Se8, a cluster Mott insulator at ambient conditions. At low pressures, the resistivity follows Efros-Shklovskii variable-range hopping, indicating Coulomb-gap-controlled carrier localization (x ~ 6.1 Angstrom). A crossover toward metallic transport begins near ~ 5 GPa, whereas a crystallographic transition from the cubic phase to a monoclinic C2 phase occurs at significantly higher pressure (~ 20 GPa), establishing a hierarchy characterized by the decoupling of electronic delocalization from structural symmetry change. At higher pressures, superconductivity (xi(0) ~ 80-90 Angstrom) emerges from the correlated metallic regime. These results identify GaNb4Se8 as a platform for studying correlation-controlled transport evolution in cluster-based solids.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>理解关联团簇固体中电子输运如何从局域化演变为巡游态，仍是凝聚态物理学中的一个重要挑战。在此，我们研究了缺位尖晶石GaNb4Se8（一种在环境条件下为团簇Mott绝缘体的材料）的压力依赖输运性质。在低压下，电阻率遵循Efros-Shklovskii变程跳跃，表明存在库仑能隙控制的载流子局域化（x ~ 6.1 Å）。向金属输运的交叉始于约5 GPa附近，而立方相到单斜C2相的晶体学转变发生在显著更高的压力下（约20 GPa），这建立了一种以电子离域与结构对称性变化解耦为特征的层级关系。在更高压力下，超导性（ξ(0) ~ 80-90 Å）从关联金属态中涌现。这些结果将GaNb4Se8确定为研究团簇基固体中关联控制输运演化的平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Yuejian Wang et al. |
| 8 | **[Thermodynamic Identification of the Internal Superconducting Phase Boundary in UTe$_2$ for $H \parallel b$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25896v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The $H$--$T$ phase diagram of UTe$_2$ for magnetic field along the hard $b$ axis contains an unresolved internal boundary near $μ_0H \sim 14$--15~T, previously inferred from ac susceptibility and transport experiments but lacking thermodynamic evidence. We report ultrasound results for several elastic modes in an ultraclean UTe$_2$ single crystal with $T_c>2$~K for $H \parallel b$ down to 0.33~K and up to 18~T. A pronounced anomaly in the longitudinal $C_{33}$ mode, with a weaker response in $C_{44}$ and no resolvable anomaly in $C_{55}$, establishes this feature as a bulk thermodynamic phase boundary and reveals a symmetry-selective coupling to lattice strain. The phase line remains nearly constant in field near 14~T and terminates near 13.5~T and 1.25~K at a tetracritical point, providing the thermodynamic evidence for the fourth phase boundary in the $H$--$T$ phase diagram. The results constrain the order-parameter structure of the high-field phase and support field-induced multicomponent superconductivity in UTe$_2$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对于沿硬b轴方向的磁场，UTe₂的H-T相图在μ₀H ~ 14–15 T附近包含一条未解明的内部边界，此前由交流磁化率和输运实验推断得出，但缺乏热力学证据。我们报告了在Tc > 2 K的超净UTe₂单晶中，沿H ∥ b方向、温度低至0.33 K、磁场高达18 T时，多种弹性模量的超声测量结果。纵向C₃₃模出现显著异常，C₄₄模响应较弱，而C₅₅模无可分辨的异常，这将该特征确立为体热力学相边界，并揭示了与晶格应变的对称性选择性耦合。该相线在14 T附近几乎保持恒定场强，并在13.5 T和1.25 K附近终止于一个四临界点，为H-T相图中的第四条相边界提供了热力学证据。这些结果约束了高场相的序参量结构，并支持UTe₂中场致多分量超导性。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Michal Vališka et al. |
| 9 | **[Bragg-Williams order competes with superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25843v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Orderings in charge and spin have been extensively studied to unravel their correlation to emergent superconductivity over the past decades. Bragg-Williams order (BWO), a classical structural order parameter describing site occupancy in alloys, has long been speculated to influence superconducting behavior. Yet, its role still remains ambiguous, largely due to the difficulty of isolating BWO from concomitant charge doping or competing electronic instabilities. Here, we establish In2/3PSe3 as a platform wherein indium vacancies are reversibly configurable between ordered and disordered states via thermal treatment. We show that the disordered phase undergoes a pressure-induced superconducting transition with a Tc of 11 K, significantly higher than the 7 K observed in its ordered counterpart. This constitutes a rare instance in which pure BWO variation drives a substantial shift in Tc. By combining a Ginzburg-Landau phenomenological analysis with a BCS-McMillan microscopic description, we demonstrate that BWO naturally suppresses superconductivity through electron-phonon interactions, a mechanism supported by ultra-low-wavenumber Raman measurements. Our findings support BWO as an independent order parameter that competes directly with superconductivity, extending the concept of competing orders beyond conventional electronic and magnetic degrees of freedom.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>过去几十年来，电荷和自旋的有序化被广泛研究以揭示其与新现超导性的关联。布拉格-威廉姆斯有序（BWO）——一种描述合金中位点占据的经典结构序参量——长期以来被推测会影响超导行为。然而，其作用仍不明确，这很大程度上是由于难以将BWO与伴随的电荷掺杂或竞争性电子不稳定性区分开来。在此，我们确立了In₂/₃PSe₃作为一个平台，其中铟空位可通过热处理在有序态和无序态之间可逆配置。我们表明，无序相经历压力诱导的超导转变，Tc为11 K，显著高于其有序对应物所观察到的7 K。这构成了一个罕见的实例，即纯BWO变化驱动了Tc的显著变化。通过结合金兹堡-朗道唯象分析与BCS-麦克米兰微观描述，我们证明了BWO通过电子-声子相互作用自然抑制了超导性，这一机制得到了超低波数拉曼测量的支持。我们的发现支持BWO作为一个独立序参量，直接与超导性竞争，将竞争序的概念扩展到传统的电子和磁自由度之外。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Xu Liu et al. |
| 10 | **[Theoretical study on ambient pressure superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films : structural analysis, model construction, and robustness of $s\pm$-wave pairing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.20497v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We theoretically study ambient pressure superconductivity in thin films of La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$. We construct model Hamiltonians adopting the crystal structure theoretically determined by fixing the in-plane lattice constant to those substrates examined in the experiment. We also construct a model based on the experimentally determined lattice structure. To the models obtained, we apply the fluctuation exchange approximation, which takes into account the full momentum and frequency dependencies of the Green function and the pairing interaction. We find that the electronic structure, including the presence/absence of the so-called $γ$-pocket (the Fermi surface originating from the top of the $d_{3z^2-r^2}$ bonding band) depends on the crystal structure adopted and/or the presence/absence of $+U$ correction in the band structure calculation. Nonetheless, $s\pm$-wave pairing symmetry remains robust regardless of these details in the band structure. The robustness of the $s\pm$-wave pairing mainly owes to the fact that it is mediated by finite energy spin fluctuations, which are insensitive to the details of the Fermi surface topology and give rise to a nearly-momentum-independent gap function for the interlayer $d_{3z^2-r^2}$ pairing in the orbital representation. On the other hand, $T_c$ being halved from that of the pressurized bulk can only be understood by adopting the model with small $|t_{\perp}|$ derived from the experimentally determined crystal structure, at least within the present FLEX approach, although there may remain some other possibilities beyond this approach for the origin of the reduced $T_c$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们理论研究了La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜在常压下的超导性。我们构建了采用理论确定的晶体结构的模型哈密顿量，其中面内晶格常数固定为实验中考察的衬底的值。我们还基于实验确定的晶格结构构建了一个模型。对于所获得的模型，我们应用了考虑格林函数和配对相互作用的全动量与频率依赖性的涨落交换近似。我们发现，电子结构——包括所谓的γ-pocket（源自d_{3z²-r²}成键带顶部的费米面）的存在与否——取决于所采用的晶体结构和/或能带结构计算中+U修正的存在与否。尽管如此，s±波配对对称性无论能带结构的这些细节如何都保持稳健。s±波配对的稳健性主要归因于它是由有限能量自旋涨落介导的，这些涨落对费米面拓扑细节不敏感，并在轨道表示中为层间d_{3z²-r²}配对产生近乎与动量无关的能隙函数。另一方面，Tc相比加压块体减半的现象，至少在当前FLEX方法框架内，只能通过采用基于实验确定的晶体结构导出的具有小|t⊥|的模型来理解，尽管对于Tc降低的起源，在此方法之外可能仍存在其他可能性。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Kensei Ushio et al. |
| 11 | **[Mutual Inductance Sensing SQUID: Cryogenic microcalorimeter based on mutual inductance readout of superconducting temperature sensors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.07917v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting microcalorimeters, such as superconducting transition-edge sensors and magnetic microcalorimeters, have emerged as state-of-the-art detectors for X-ray emission spectroscopy by combining near-unity quantum efficiency with excellent energy resolution. Despite these achievements, their resolving power has not yet reached the level required to rival modern wavelength-dispersive grating or crystal spectrometers. Here, we introduce a next-generation SQUID-based microcalorimeter concept that exploits the strong temperature dependence of the magnetic penetration depth of a superconductor operated close to its critical temperature. The resulting mutual-inductance-based readout enables in situ tunable signal amplification, while inherently avoiding hysteretic effects that commonly limit superconducting sensors. Experiments with prototype devices demonstrate robust and reproducible operation over a wide temperature range. Based on our measurements and modeling, we project that, using an optimized absorber-sensor combination, an energy resolution below 100meV (FWHM) should be achievable for soft X-ray photons with energies below 800eV. This approach therefore represents a promising pathway towards next-generation cryogenic detectors for high-precision X-ray emission spectroscopy.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导微量热计，例如超导转变边传感器和磁微量热计，通过将接近统一的量子效率与优异的能量分辨率相结合，已成为X射线发射光谱学领域的先进探测器。尽管取得了这些成就，但其分辨能力尚未达到能与现代波长色散光栅或晶体光谱仪相媲美的水平。在此，我们提出一种基于SQUID的下一代微量热计概念，该概念利用了超导体在其临界温度附近运行时磁穿透深度的强温度依赖性。由此产生的基于互感的读出方式可实现原位可调信号放大，同时固有地避免了通常限制超导传感器的磁滞效应。原型器件的实验证明了其在宽温度范围内具有稳健且可重复的操作性能。基于我们的测量和建模，我们预计，通过使用优化的吸收体-传感器组合，对于能量低于800eV的软X射线光子，应可实现低于100meV（半高全宽）的能量分辨率。因此，该方法代表了通往用于高精度X射线发射光谱学的下一代低温探测器的有前景的路径。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Jodok Zeuner et al. |
| 12 | **[Elucidating mechanism of optical cavities in superconducting strip single photon detectors using transmission line and impedance models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25425v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We clarified the physical mechanism of superconducting strip single photon detectors (SSPDs) with optical cavities by using transmission line and impedance models. By introducing the transmission line model, we derived the analytical formulae for the absorptance of SSPDs with optical cavities. We compared the absorptance obtained from the analytical formulae for SSPDs with single-side, double-side, and dielectric multi-layer optical cavities against the results of numerical simulations. The comparison showed that the results were nearly identical. By introducing the impedance model, it was clearly shown that the SSPDs with optical cavities achieved the maximum absorptance when their input impedance of the SSPDs with optical cavities matched the impedance of the input medium. The design concepts proposed in this study are applicable to other superconducting detectors, such as microwave kinetic inductance detectors and transition-edge sensors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用传输线和阻抗模型阐明了带有光学腔的超导带状单光子探测器（SSPD）的物理机制。通过引入传输线模型，我们推导出了带有光学腔的SSPD吸收率的解析公式。我们将从解析公式获得的带有单面、双面和介质多层光学腔的SSPD的吸收率与数值模拟结果进行了比较。比较表明结果几乎一致。通过引入阻抗模型，清楚地表明，当带有光学腔的SSPD的输入阻抗与输入介质的阻抗匹配时，其吸收率达到最大。本研究提出的设计概念可应用于其他超导探测器，例如微波动力学电感探测器和转变边传感器。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Hiroki Kutsuma et al. |
| 13 | **[Extended Hubbard model on fractals: d-Wave superconductivity and competing pairing channels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17362v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Fractal structures such as the Sierpiński gasket have been predicted to enhance the critical temperature of s-wave superconductivity compared to regular crystals while maintaining macroscopic phase coherence of Cooper pairs. Here we extend this analysis to order parameters with non-trivial symmetry by studying the extended Hubbard model with nearest-neighbor attraction on fractal lattices. Using Bogoliubov-de Gennes mean-field theory, we find that the Sierpiński carpet dramatically alters the competition between pairing channels: the predominant d-wave superconducting dome at half filling of the square lattice becomes unstable for the carpet, while at high and low fillings extended s-wave pairing gets strongly enhanced. We attribute this to geometric frustration of sign-changing order parameters by the fractal boundary structure. On the triangular Sierpiński gasket, hybrid s+d+id states show critical temperature enhancement comparable to that previously observed for pure s-wave pairing. Our results demonstrate that fractal geometry acts as a selective filter for pairing symmetries, with the compatibility between order parameter structure and lattice topology determining which channels are stabilized or suppressed.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>与规则晶体相比，诸如谢尔宾斯基地毯之类的分形结构已被预测能够增强s波超导的临界温度，同时保持库珀对的宏观相位相干性。在此，我们通过研究分形晶格上具有最近邻吸引的扩展哈伯德模型，将这一分析扩展到具有非平凡对称性的序参量。使用Bogoliubov-de Gennes平均场理论，我们发现谢尔宾斯基地毯显著改变了配对通道之间的竞争：在方形晶格半填充时占主导的d波超导穹顶在地毯结构中变得不稳定，而在高填充和低填充时，扩展s波配对则被强烈增强。我们将此归因于分形边界结构对变号序参量的几何阻挫。在三角形谢尔宾斯基地毯上，混合的s+d+id态显示出与先前在纯s波配对中观察到的相当的临界温度增强。我们的结果表明，分形几何充当了配对对称性的选择性滤波器，序参量结构与晶格拓扑之间的兼容性决定了哪些通道被稳定或抑制。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Robert Canyellas et al. |
| 14 | **[Millikelvin digital-to-analog converter for superconducting quantum processors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25303v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scaling superconducting quantum processors is increasingly constrained by the wiring, heat load, and calibration overhead associated with delivering high-resolution analog signals from room temperature to qubits at millikelvin temperature. Here we demonstrate a superconducting digital-to-analog converter (DAC) integrated with high-coherence fluxonium qubits in a multi-chip module architecture. The DACs generate persistent analog flux signals for tuning qubit parameters and are programmed deterministically using single-flux-quantum (SFQ) pulses, providing a digital interface compatible with established SFQ routing and demultiplexing technologies. Operating at millikelvin temperature, the DACs enable in-situ tuning of fluxonium qubits without measurable degradation of qubit coherence. The presented device provides a static control primitive for flux-tunable qubits, enabling parameter homogenization and eliminating the need for individual room-temperature DC bias lines. These results establish SFQ-programmable millikelvin DACs as a building block for digitally controlled superconducting quantum processors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>扩展超导量子处理器的规模日益受到与将高分辨率模拟信号从室温传输到毫开尔文温度下的量子比特相关的布线、热负载和校准开销的限制。在此，我们展示了一种与高相干性磁通量子比特集成在多芯片模块架构中的超导数模转换器（DAC）。这些DAC产生用于调谐量子比特参数的持久模拟磁通信号，并使用单磁通量子（SFQ）脉冲进行确定性编程，提供了与已建立的SFQ路由和解复用技术兼容的数字接口。在毫开尔文温度下运行时，这些DAC能够原位调谐磁通量子比特，而不会对量子比特的相干性产生可测量的退化。所提出的器件为磁通可调量子比特提供了一种静态控制基元，实现了参数均质化，并消除了对单独室温直流偏置线的需求。这些结果确立了SFQ可编程毫开尔文DAC作为数字控制超导量子处理器构建模块的地位。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Ruizi Hu et al. |
| 15 | **[High-field magneto-optical imaging of superconducting critical states beyond 10 T using a paramagnetic garnet sensor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25274v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Spatially resolved characterization of the critical current density Jc in superconductors under high magnetic fields is crucial for both fundamental understanding and practical applications. However, conventional techniques primarily provide bulk-averaged values, making it difficult to resolve local variations of Jc, especially in high magnetic fields. In this work, we develop a magneto-optical imaging (MOI) technique that enables visualization of superconducting critical states in steady magnetic fields up to 13 T. This is achieved by employing a paramagnetic Nd-garnet indicator combined with a polarizing microscope system. Using this method, we directly image the magnetic flux distribution in a bulk single crystal of an iron-based superconductor Ba(Fe1-xCox)2As2 (x = 0.075) at 12 K and 20 K across the entire sample area (approximately 1 mm). From the measured magnetic field distributions, we quantitatively reconstruct the spatial distribution of the critical current density. The extracted field dependence of Jc is in good agreement with that obtained from conventional magnetization measurements. Furthermore, we demonstrate vector mapping of current flow within the sample by converting the magnetic field distribution into local current-density distributions. Our results establish high-field MOI as a powerful approach for spatially resolved evaluation of superconducting critical states and provide a new pathway for investigating inhomogeneous current transport in superconductors under high magnetic fields.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在高磁场下对超导体中临界电流密度Jc进行空间分辨表征，对于基础理解和实际应用都至关重要。然而，传统技术主要提供体平均数值，难以分辨Jc的局部变化，尤其是在高磁场下。在本工作中，我们开发了一种磁光成像（MOI）技术，该技术能够可视化高达13T稳态磁场下的超导临界态。这是通过采用顺磁性钕石榴石指示剂结合偏光显微镜系统实现的。利用该方法，我们在12K和20K温度下，直接对整个样品区域（约1毫米）的铁基超导体Ba(Fe1-xCox)2As2 (x = 0.075)块材单晶中的磁通分布进行了成像。根据测得的磁场分布，我们定量重构了临界电流密度的空间分布。提取的Jc的场依赖性与从传统磁化测量中获得的结果吻合良好。此外，我们通过将磁场分布转换为局部电流密度分布，展示了样品内电流流动的矢量映射。我们的结果确立了高场MOI作为一种对超导临界态进行空间分辨评估的强大方法，并为研究高磁场下超导体中不均匀的电流输运提供了新途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Yuto Kinoshita et al. |
| 16 | **[Data-Driven Hamiltonian Reduction for Superconducting Qubits via Meta-Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24912v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce HAML (Hamiltonian Adaptation via Meta-Learning), a framework for fast online adaptation of effective Hamiltonian models of superconducting quantum processors. HAML proceeds in two phases. A supervised training phase uses an ensemble of simulated devices to learn an offline map from control inputs and device parameters to effective Hamiltonian coefficients. An online adaptation phase then uses a small number of hardware-accessible measurements to identify the unknown parameters of a new device. By training directly against effective two-qubit coefficients extracted from full multi-mode simulations, HAML implicitly learns the reduction from full multi-mode Hamiltonians to effective qubit descriptions without invoking perturbation theory. We further show that a variance-maximizing greedy selection of measurement configurations boosts online adaptation efficiency. We demonstrate HAML on a transmon-coupler-transmon system, recovering effective two-qubit coefficients across a wide range of operating regimes, including parameter regions where Schrieffer-Wolff perturbation theory (SWPT) breaks down. This establishes a scalable, sample-efficient approach to Hamiltonian reduction and characterization for near-term quantum processors, with direct implications for calibration, control, and error mitigation.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出 HAML（基于元学习的哈密顿量自适应框架），一种用于超导量子处理器有效哈密顿量模型快速在线自适应的框架。HAML 分为两个阶段：监督训练阶段利用模拟器件集成学习从控制输入和器件参数到有效哈密顿量系数的离线映射；在线自适应阶段则通过少量硬件可访问的测量来识别新器件的未知参数。通过直接针对从完整多模仿真中提取的有效双量子比特系数进行训练，HAML 隐式学习了从完整多模哈密顿量到有效量子比特描述的约化过程，无需借助微扰理论。我们进一步证明，采用方差最大化的贪心测量配置选择可提升在线自适应效率。我们在 transmon-耦合器-transmon 系统中验证了 HAML，在包括 Schrieffer-Wolff 微扰理论失效的参数区域在内的广泛工作区间内，成功恢复了有效双量子比特系数。这为近期待量子处理器建立了一种可扩展、样本高效的哈密顿量约化与表征方法，对校准、控制及错误缓解具有直接影响。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Arielle Sanford et al. |
| 17 | **[Suppression of Superconductivity and Electrostatic Side Gate Tuning in High Mobility SrTiO$_3$ Surface Electron Gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22205v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report on the fabrication and characterization of patterned high-mobility two-dimensional electron gases (2DEG) formed on SrTiO$_3$ (STO) substrate surfaces by hydrogen plasma exposure. The resulting devices consistently showed high electron mobilities up to 7400 cm$^2$/V$\cdot$s. A large range of electron density was systematically explored by controlled aging of the sample between cooldowns, including the expected range for the STO 2DEG superconducting dome. No superconducting transition was observed down to the base temperature of approximately 10 mK. This suggests suppression of superconductivity in high mobility quasi-two-dimensional SrTiO$_3$ electron gas, likely linked to vertical confinement and electronic orbital rearrangement. We systematically explored electrostatic gate modulation in this 2DEG system and its scaling with electron density and side gate geometry. In contrast with our initial expectation, we observed an improvement of achievable total modulation for larger side gate to channel separation. At low electron density, stochastic channel pinch-off events were observed, creating quasi-ballistic constrictions with irregular conductance quantization. This epitaxy-free and high mobility oxide material platform offers a promising new route towards patterning quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了通过氢等离子体暴露在 SrTiO₃ (STO) 衬底表面形成的图案化高迁移率二维电子气 (2DEG) 的制备与表征。所得器件始终展现出高达 7400 cm²/V·s 的高电子迁移率。通过样品在降温间的受控老化，我们系统地探索了宽范围的电子密度，包括 STO 2DEG 超导穹顶的预期范围。在低至约 10 mK 的基温下未观察到超导转变。这表明高迁移率准二维 SrTiO₃ 电子气中的超导电性被抑制，可能源于垂直限域和电子轨道重排。我们系统地研究了该 2DEG 系统中的静电门控调制及其随电子密度和侧栅几何尺寸的标度关系。与初始预期相反，我们观察到侧栅与沟道间距越大，可实现的总调制幅度反而提升。在低电子密度下，观察到随机沟道夹断事件，形成了具有不规则电导量子化的准弹道收缩区。这种无外延且高迁移率的氧化物材料平台为量子器件的图案化提供了一条有前景的新途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Dickson Boahen et al. |
| 18 | **[Experimental high-dimensional multi-qubit Bell non-locality on a superconducting quantum processor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24740v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Combining recent advances in superconducting quantum hardware, we explore quantum correlations in a previously inaccessible regime by observing \emph{simultaneously} high-dimensional and many-body Bell non-locality. We report a high-confidence Bell violation in the correlations between two $d=64$-dimensional systems encoded in twelve qubits. For system sizes up to $d=32$, the strength of the observed nonlocal correlations exceeds the quantum upper bound for $d=2$ systems, providing direct evidence of high-dimensional nonlocality. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the observed violation is genuinely collective: all qubits contribute to the nonlocal correlations, while most pairwise correlations across the bipartition remain Bell-local. Our work illustrates how present-day quantum processors enable the exploration of fundamental predictions of quantum mechanics in previously inaccessible regimes and, in turn, how fundamental quantum effects can be used to benchmark their performance.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>结合超导量子硬件的最新进展，我们通过观测同时具有高维和多体特性的贝尔非局域性，探索了先前无法触及的量子关联。我们在编码于十二个量子比特中的两个 d=64 维系统之间的关联中，报告了高置信度的贝尔不等式违背。对于系统维度高达 d=32 的情况，观测到的非局域关联强度超过了 d=2 系统的量子上界，直接证明了高维非局域性的存在。此外，我们证明观测到的违背是真正集体性的：所有量子比特都对非局域关联有贡献，而二分划分下的大多数成对关联仍保持贝尔局域性。我们的工作展示了当代量子处理器如何能够探索量子力学在先前无法触及区域的基本预言，反之，基本量子效应又如何可用于基准测试其性能。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Yousef Mafi et al. |
| 19 | **[Cosine bands, flat bands and superconductivity in orthorhombic iron selenide](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24298v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Electronic band structures (EBSs) for orthorhombic beta FeSe1-x at less than 16 K and up to 23 GPa using experimentally determined cell dimensions are evaluated for cosine-shaped bands near, or crossing, EF. Cosine shaped bands are present in reciprocal directions parallel to the c axis at all pressures. Calculations using a P1 cell derived from Cmma symmetry with a 2c superlattice moderates the effect of intersecting bands to 9.0 GPa. This approach enables determination of a superconducting gap consistent with experimentally determined values. Key influences on charge distribution and transfer in the interplanar region of beta FeSe1-x are lone pair electrons which feature as flat bands (FBs) near EF along GZ in an EBS. FBs also influence the topology of Fermi surfaces as pressure increases and in directions parallel to the c* direction (i.e. offset along ky) within the Brillouin zone. At the Fermi surface along b*, cosine bands split and align favorably for electron-hole pairing with nodal inflection points located at EF. For P greater than 12.0 GPa, FBs interact with folded cosine bands invoking additional band dispersions. These calculations suggest that FBs participate in, and with increased pressure, enhance and sustain the superconducting properties of beta FeSe1-x to 23 GPa.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>利用实验确定的晶胞尺寸，评估了正交相 β-FeSe₁₋ₓ 在低于 16 K 和高达 23 GPa 压力下，靠近或穿越费米能级 (EF) 的余弦形能带的电子能带结构 (EBS)。在所有压力下，平行于 c 轴的倒易方向上均存在余弦形能带。使用源自 Cmma 对称性并带有 2c 超晶格的 P1 晶胞进行的计算，将能带交叉效应缓和至 9.0 GPa 以下。该方法能够确定与实验值一致的超导能隙。β-FeSe₁₋ₓ 层间区域电荷分布与转移的关键影响因素是孤对电子，其在 EBS 中沿 GZ 方向表现为靠近 EF 的平带 (FB)。随着压力增加以及在布里渊区内平行于 c* 方向（即沿 ky 方向偏移），FB 也影响费米面的拓扑结构。在沿 b* 方向的费米面上，余弦能带分裂并对齐，有利于在 EF 处具有节点拐点的电子-空穴配对。当压力大于 12.0 GPa 时，FB 与折叠的余弦能带相互作用，引发额外的能带色散。这些计算表明，FB 参与并随压力增加而增强和维持 β-FeSe₁₋ₓ 在高达 23 GPa 压力下的超导特性。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Ian D R Mackinnon et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Protein folding on a 64 qubit trapped-ion hardware via counterdiabatic quantum optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26861v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report the largest trapped-ion hardware demonstration of lattice protein-folding optimization to date, using bias-field digitized counterdiabatic quantum optimization (BF-DCQO) on a fully connected 64-qubit Barium development system similar to the forthcoming IonQ Tempo line. Six peptide sequences with 14-16 amino-acid residues are encoded using a coarse-grained tetrahedral lattice model, yielding higher-order spin-glass Hamiltonians with long-range interactions involving up to five-body terms and mapped to 46-61 qubits. The resulting instances are demanding for near-term quantum hardware because low-energy configurations must satisfy backbone-geometry constraints while optimizing dense residue-contact interactions. BF-DCQO uses a non-variational bias-feedback mechanism, where low-energy samples from each round define longitudinal fields that guide subsequent quantum evolutions. Across the studied instances, BF-DCQO shifts raw sampled energy distributions toward lower energies than uniform random sampling, with the strongest improvements appearing in residue-contact variables. To preserve this signal, we introduce a consensus-based post-processing pipeline that combines quantum-learned contact information with feasible backbone geometries. The resulting hybrid workflow reaches the classical reference energy in multiple instances and improves over the corresponding random-seeded pipeline. These results show that BF-DCQO can generate structured samples for dense protein-folding Hamiltonians at previously unexplored trapped-ion scales.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了迄今为止最大规模的晶格蛋白质折叠优化囚禁离子硬件演示，在类似于即将推出的IonQ Tempo系列的64量子比特全连接钡离子开发系统上，采用偏置场数字化反绝热量子优化（BF-DCQO）方法。使用粗粒化四面体晶格模型编码了六种含14-16个氨基酸残基的肽序列，生成了包含最多五体项长程相互作用的高阶自旋玻璃哈密顿量，并映射至46-61个量子比特。由于低能构型必须在优化密集残基接触相互作用的同时满足主链几何约束，这些实例对近期量子硬件提出了较高要求。BF-DCQO采用非变分偏置反馈机制，利用每轮迭代中的低能样本定义纵向场，从而引导后续量子演化。在所研究的实例中，BF-DCQO将原始采样能量分布向低于均匀随机采样的方向偏移，其中残基接触变量的改进最为显著。为保留该信号，我们引入基于共识的后处理流程，将量子学习到的接触信息与可行主链几何结构相结合。由此产生的混合工作流在多个实例中达到经典参考能量，并优于相应的随机种子工作流。这些结果表明，BF-DCQO能够在先前未探索的囚禁离子规模下，为密集蛋白质折叠哈密顿量生成结构化样本。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Alejandro Gomez Cadavid et al. |
| 2 | **[Griffiths inequalities and Gibbs-Bogoliubov inequality for general gauge glasses with Gaussian disorder on Nishimori line](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25697v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We consider a class of gauge glass models with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line, including the Ising spin glass, the $XY$ gauge glass, the $Z_q$ gauge glass, and the gauge-invariant Potts model. We prove that the first and second Griffiths inequalities hold for these models on arbitrary lattice structures. As a consequence, both the pressure and the correlation functions are monotonically increasing with respect to the inverse temperature along the Nishimori line. Furthermore, we establish an analogue of the Gibbs--Bogoliubov inequality for this class of models. This result implies that, on the Nishimori line, the approximate quenched free energy obtained via the replica method with a replica-symmetric mean-field approximation is always greater than the true quenched free energy. Our results provide a broad generalization of previous results established for the Ising spin glass with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们考虑西森线上具有高斯无序的一类规范玻璃模型，包括伊辛自旋玻璃、$XY$规范玻璃、$Z_q$规范玻璃以及规范不变波茨模型。我们证明，在任意晶格结构上，这些模型的第一和第二Griffiths不等式成立。由此可知，沿西森线，压强和关联函数均随逆温度单调递增。此外，我们为该类模型建立了吉布斯-博戈留博夫不等式的类比形式。该结果表明，在西森线上，通过复制对称平均场近似的复制方法获得的近似淬火自由能始终大于真实淬火自由能。我们的结果对先前针对西森线上高斯无序伊辛自旋玻璃所建立的结果进行了广泛推广。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Manaka Okuyama et al. |
| 3 | **[Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17936v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Training in machine learning generally consists in finding one model, whose parameters minimize a data-dependent loss. Yet, empirical work shows that ensemble learning, an approach in which multiple models are sampled, can improve performance. Here, we provide an analytical framework to understand these observations in the case of Boltzmann machines, exploiting a duality between ensemble learning and large deviations of the free energy in spin-glass models. Replica calculations allow us to fully solve the case of spherical Boltzmann machine ensembles, and clarify when ensemble learning improves over standard loss minimization, in particular for nearly finite-dimensional data. Our framework can also be applied to complex data distributions, in agreement with numerical simulations on deep networks.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>机器学习训练通常旨在寻找单一模型，其参数能最小化数据相关的损失函数。然而实证研究表明，采用多模型采样的集成学习方法可提升性能。本文针对玻尔兹曼机建立分析框架，利用集成学习与自旋玻璃模型中自由能大偏差理论的对偶性来解释上述现象。通过副本计算，我们完整求解了球形玻尔兹曼机集成问题，阐明了集成学习在何种条件下优于标准损失最小化方法——尤其是针对近有限维数据。该框架还可应用于复杂数据分布，与深度网络数值模拟结果一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Thomas Tulinski et al. |
| 4 | **[Bayesian phase transition for the critical Ising model: Enlarged replica symmetry in the epsilon expansion and in 2D](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23346v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A process that images or measures bond energies in the critical Ising model can be in distinct measurement ``phases'', depending on the precision of measurement. We study the transition into the strong-measurement phase using replica field theory (an epsilon expansion around six dimensions) and numerical simulations in two dimensions. The results reveal multiscaling of correlation functions at the critical point, and a striking enlarged symmetry of the replica description. This is an analog of the Nishimori phenomenon in the Ising spin glass, in a distinct replica limit. The enlarged symmetry is present microscopically for certain measurement protocols, but more generally can emerge in the infrared, and it fixes the exact value of the exponent for the Edwards-Anderson correlator both in 2D and near the upper critical dimension. We also examine the epsilon expansion for models with power-law interactions and/or long-range measurement.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对临界伊辛模型中键能进行成像或测量的过程，根据测量精度可处于不同的测量"相"。我们采用副本场论（六维ε展开）与二维数值模拟研究强测量相变。结果表明临界点关联函数存在多标度行为，且副本描述呈现显著的对称性增强现象。这对应于伊辛自旋玻璃中Nishimori现象在特定副本极限下的类比。该增强对称性在特定测量协议下具有微观起源，但更普遍情况下可在红外区域涌现，并精确确定了二维及上临界维度附近Edwards-Anderson关联函数的临界指数。我们还研究了具有幂律相互作用和/或长程测量模型的ε展开。</p></details> | 2026-04-25 | Kay Joerg Wiese et al. |
| 5 | **[Autonomous Emergence of Hamiltonian in Deep Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20821v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The unprecedented predictive success of deep generative models in complex many-body systems, such as AlphaFold3, raises an epistemological question: do these networks merely memorize data distributions via high-dimensional interpolation, or do they autonomously deduce the underlying physical laws? To address this, we introduce a rigorous algebraic framework to extract the implicit physical interactions learned by generative models. By establishing an exact equivalence between the zero-noise limit of a Riemannian diffusion score field and the thermodynamic restoring force, we utilize the trained neural network as a direct force estimator. Applying this framework to a sequence-dependent, frustrated 1D $O(3)$ spin glass, we probe the latent representations of an $O(3)$-equivariant attention architecture trained solely on thermal equilibrium snapshots. Without incorporating any energetic priors, an overdetermined linear inversion successfully recovers the microscopic Hamiltonian parameters of the spin system. The inferred Hamiltonian parameters exhibit a $99.7\%$ cosine similarity with the ground-truth interaction parameters. Furthermore, these sparse local parameters alone are sufficient to explain $87\%$ of the variance in the continuous force field predicted by the network. Our results provide quantitative, falsifiable evidence that deep generative architectures do not merely perform statistical pattern matching, but autonomously discover and internalize the underlying physical rules.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>深度生成模型在复杂多体系统（如AlphaFold3）中取得了前所未有的预测成功，这引发了一个认识论问题：这些网络仅仅是通过高维插值来记忆数据分布，还是自主推导出了潜在的物理定律？为解决此问题，我们引入了一个严格的代数框架来提取生成模型所学习的隐式物理相互作用。通过建立黎曼扩散得分场零噪声极限与热力学恢复力之间的精确等价关系，我们将训练好的神经网络用作直接的力估计器。将该框架应用于一个序列依赖、受挫的一维$O(3)$自旋玻璃模型，我们探究了一个仅基于热平衡快照训练的$O(3)$等变注意力架构的潜在表征。在不引入任何能量先验的情况下，一个超定线性反演成功恢复了自旋系统的微观哈密顿量参数。推断出的哈密顿量参数与真实相互作用参数的余弦相似度达到$99.7\%$。此外，仅凭这些稀疏的局域参数就能解释网络预测的连续力场中$87\%$的方差。我们的结果提供了定量、可证伪的证据，表明深度生成架构并非仅仅执行统计模式匹配，而是自主发现并内化了潜在的物理规则。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Wenjie Xi et al. |
| 6 | **[Tensor network surrogate models for variational quantum computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20180v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We adopt a two-dimensional tensor-network (TN) ansatz to simulate variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional qubit architectures, demonstrating its capability to accurately simulate deep circuits through the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) applied to Ising spin-glass problems on heavy-hexagonal and square lattices. For heavy-hexagonal problems with up to three-body interactions, parameters trained on small instances and transferred to systems an order of magnitude larger improve the sampled energy distribution only up to intermediate depths, indicating a fundamental limit of parameter concentration as a transfer strategy. By extending the training itself with TN simulations on larger system sizes, we avoid local minima and obtain lower-energy samples. Analyses of entanglement growth and importance sampling show that the simulation remains classically feasible with moderate bond dimension. We find that parameter concentration also persists on square lattices, albeit at substantially higher computational cost to perform reliable sampling. Overall, our TN framework not only provides an efficient and controlled framework for benchmarking variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional lattices, but also serves as an effective surrogate model for training variational algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们采用二维张量网络（TN）变分拟设来模拟二维量子比特架构上的变分量子算法，通过将量子近似优化算法（QAOA）应用于重六边形和方形晶格上的伊辛自旋玻璃问题，展示了其精确模拟深度电路的能力。对于包含最多三体相互作用的重六边形问题，在小规模实例上训练并迁移至大一个数量级系统的参数，仅能在中等深度内改善采样能量分布，这表明参数集中化作为一种迁移策略存在根本性局限。通过使用张量网络模拟在更大系统规模上扩展训练本身，我们避免了局部极小值并获得了更低能量的样本。对纠缠增长和重要性采样的分析表明，该模拟在中等键维数下仍保持经典可行性。我们发现参数集中化在方形晶格上同样存在，尽管进行可靠采样的计算成本显著更高。总体而言，我们的张量网络框架不仅为在二维晶格上基准测试变分量子算法提供了高效且可控的框架，同时也作为训练变分算法的有效替代模型。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Ryo Watanabe et al. |
| 7 | **[NaCl-Assisted Growth of Ferroelectric SnSe Nanosheets with Spin Glass-like Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10067v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Two-dimensional (2D) SnSe is an emerging 2D material exhibiting intriguing properties such as ferroelectricity and nonlinear optical response. Here, high-quality single-crystalline SnSe nanosheets were synthesized via NaCl-assisted chemical vapor deposition (CVD) method. The addition of NaCl was found to significantly increase the surface coverage of the nanosheets with less influence on their lateral size. The crystalline structure and composition of as-grown nanosheets were charactered by XRD, Raman spectroscopy, and XPS. Ferroelectric domains in SnSe nanosheets are directly visualized by piezoresponse force microscopy (PFM). The magnetic hysteresis loops of SnSe nanosheets are achieved at 2 K, which indicated their weak ferromagnetism. A spin glass-like behavior was observed below 115K, which is attributed to the presence of SnSe2 impurity. This work further establishes a controllable synthesis route for SnSe nanosheets, thereby paving the way for subsequent investigation of their ferroelectric properties.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>二维（2D）SnSe是一种新兴的二维材料，展现出铁电性和非线性光学响应等引人入胜的特性。本文通过氯化钠辅助化学气相沉积（CVD）方法合成了高质量的单晶SnSe纳米片。研究发现，添加氯化钠能显著提高纳米片的表面覆盖率，而对其横向尺寸影响较小。利用X射线衍射（XRD）、拉曼光谱和X射线光电子能谱（XPS）对生长所得纳米片的晶体结构和组成进行了表征。通过压电力显微镜（PFM）直接观察了SnSe纳米片中的铁电畴。在2K温度下获得了SnSe纳米片的磁滞回线，表明其具有弱铁磁性。在115K以下观察到类似自旋玻璃的行为，这归因于SnSe2杂质的存在。本工作进一步建立了一种可控的SnSe纳米片合成路线，从而为其后续铁电性能的研究铺平了道路。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Huiwen Xu et al. |
